title: ERROR: 2nd expression of procedural for-loop is not constant!
code_blocks:
Yosys 0.16+41 (git sha1 UNKNOWN, clang 3.9.1-19ubuntu1 -fPIC -Os)


yosys> read_verilog -sv GetInstPtr.v 
1. Executing Verilog-2005 frontend: GetInstPtr.v
Parsing SystemVerilog input from `GetInstPtr.v' to AST representation.
Generating RTLIL representation for module `\GetInsnPtr'.
GetInstPtr.v:21: ERROR: 2nd expression of procedural for-loop is not constant!
